Includes custom, unique and improved armor bonuses for a more fun gameplay.

Custom bonuses. Compatible with V1 and V2 of the game or later. Compatible with the new cosmetic system introduced in 2.0. Built - in support for Escape from Tarkov and Rebirth.

Compatible with V1, V2 and any later version of the game.

Compatible with every other zombies mod.

Weapon stats are tweaked and tested to make it as balanced as possible, while keeping it fun. IT DOES NOT REPLACE THE VANILLA WEAPONS, but it adds several new weapons instead.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja T2 into T3 grade weapons

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description:
More than 140 new deco blocks, workstations, lamps, powered lights, neon lights, crops, ingredients, foods, drinks, weapons, hats, safe storage and much more, all inspired by Christmas. 

It also includes Christmas music played by musical elves, custom sounds, tweaks to some vanilla features, , world loot, air drops, game events and much more!.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Christmas Is Coming

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: This mod Adds New Recruitable NPCs to the game. This version 1.0.0 adds the first one in the collection, CyberSonja, a highly lethal mercenary from a cyberpunk alternative reality. She is here to kick ass and chew bubblegum, and she just ran out of bubblegum!
State.Name: LittleRedSonja CyberGirls NPCs

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: This mod is intended to add and improve decorations for your bases, in the form of new pickupable items, new crafting recipes, and add some additional functionality to some of the decoration items in the game
State.Name: Fancy Home Deco

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: This mod adds 10 custom wall art decorations inspired by Fallouts most iconic drink, Nuka Cola!. Craftable in the workbench, ideal to decorate your vault.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Fancy Wall Art - NukaCola

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: A mighty Tractor vehicle I made for some friends. You can dye it with your favorite color. It includes custom mods for Super Charger, Light mod, Fuel Reserve mod, and Plow, but can also equip all the other mods up to 5 in total. Custom horn sound. Craftable in the workbench. The mod is for V1 or later versions of 7 days to die.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Farmer Sage Tractor Vehicle

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: Adds 45 cute Plushies for you to decorate your base or bring with you in your adventures. They can all be placed on top of ANY surface, at any level. You can pick them up after being placed. All are craftable in the workbench, no skill unlock required. Version 1.1.0 added a "Catch them All" minigame and an optional "Loot Only" mode.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Plushies

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: Adds a new recruitable NPC, Frank Castle, The Punisher. The only way to stop the bad guys is to hire a worse one, And Frank is ready to help you kick some zombie ass. Compatible with both V1 and V2 versions of the game.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Punisher NPC

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: This mod adds a craftable "Online Shopping Terminal" that allows you to buy, 24/7, from a selection of rare, difficult to find or highly demanded items, such as solar cells, engines, learning elixirs, duct tape, candies and much much more.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Shopping Time

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: Adds 6 new funny zombie models, a lot of color variants and Feral and Radiated variants for a total of 54 different zombies to add to your game. The zombies have different stats compared with vanilla, but there are no overpowered zombies, everything stays as balanced and close to vanilla as possible. They are lootable if you are using EFTX mod.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja ZombiePack

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: Add a new vehicle, the Zombie Removers Army Truck. Includes a "Rusty Cammo" and a "Dyable" variants. Capacity for 10 players. 7 mod slots. Big storage. Custom visuals for all the installable vehicle mods.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja ZR Army Truck

This is a Mod - and should be installed in your Appdata Mod Folder.  For Multiplayer, it must be installed both server and client side.  This will require generating a new Random Map.

State.Author: FREIZE1T
State.Description:
Adds Decoration/Artifacts to the game.

Update for Game Version 2.0

The loot probability has been completely reworked. 

Can now only be found in desk, wall, and gun safes. 

It should be really rare now.
State.Name: Museum Artifacts - Collector's First Choice

State.Author: NUGZ
State.Description: Adds the 26 letters of english language to the game in Pink neon lights. They can be turned on and off. They require a power source and use 1w each.
State.Name: NUGZ Neon Letters Pack (working in 2.1)

State.Author: Double G
State.Description: If you're not feeling Trader Joel's new 1.0 voice, then install this mod and he'll be back to his old grizzly sounding self.
State.Name: OG Trader Joel Voice Lines for V1.0

State.Author: Pandalici0
State.Description: A configurable, adaptive backpack expansion for 7 Days to Die 3.0. Adds paged inventory, Pack Mule scaling, smarter Death Backpack recovery, safer vehicle/drone/storage handling, and Move All/Take All fixes. Vanilla UI supported; other UI layouts are experimental.
State.Name: Pandalici0's Adaptive Backpack

State.Author: Phys1csGamez
State.Description: NEW - Now only the fletching feathers of the standard arrows and bolts flash colors as you approach them for easier pickup.
State.Name: PGz Flashy Fletching v1

State.Author: magione
State.Description:
A small mod that adds the option to pick up mines after placing them on the ground or picking up POI mines.



Compatible with 1.0.
State.Name: Pick up mines (1.0)

State.Author: khzmusik
State.Description: All water from natural sources is polluted and must be purified.
State.Name: Polluted Water

State.Author: Laydor
State.Description: Quartz is a UI modding framework for 7 Days to Die. It adds new XUi Widgets and XUi Controllers that give modders more freedom on creating new and powerful UIs for 7 Days to Die.
State.Name: Quartz

State.Author: PaLoALo
State.Description:
Complete re-write of the original mod.

I reached out to the original author with no success, and spoke to Fox who already had permission to rewrite it and he gave me permission to do so.

This mod will be taken down if the original author wishes it so.
State.Name: Quest Revamp-Gears Edition

State.Author: P4TTO
State.Description: Gather Research Data to craft Skill Magazines on the new Research Bench.
State.Name: Research - Skill Magazine Crafting (A21)

State.Author: mazriq
State.Description: V3.0 (b259) compatibility patch for ShinjiCG's SCG Defense Solutions. Turrets, traps, fences, sensors and lighting working on the current build. Credit to ShinjiCG (assets) and DiggiDiggslay.
State.Name: SCG Defense Solutions (V3.0 Patch)

State.Author: D3tonad0r
State.Description: With these super-powerful smart goggles, which combine 5 attribute mods, you gain +1 to all attributes, +10% XP, +10 to loot level and a reduced treasure radius. A perfect upgrade for survivors seeking efficiency, power and faster progression in the apocalypse.
State.Name: Smart Goggles v2.6(Latest)

State.Author: GoblinRemovalist
State.Description: Adds a balanced recipe for a Sprain Healing Kit, because I hate that status ailment.
State.Name: Sprain Healing Kit by GR

State.Author: Flatlander
State.Description: **Starting Bicycle For Streamers and Busy People** lets you start your zombie-slaying adventures with the bicycle. Don't forget to install the included storage mods and wear the classy glasses.
State.Name: Starting Bicycle For Streamers and Busy People

State.Author: ExCyborg
State.Description: Adds incentive to use advanced meals. Adds a bit of challenge to the game.
State.Name: Survivor's Appetite

State.Description: Apex Tower is a 16-story art-deco skyscraper, designed as the ground zero of the apocalypse — a vertical chronicle of greed, immortality, and retribution.

State.Description: This mod adds a custom block called the Deconstructor, which will deconstruct items into a percentage of their base components.

Doug and his expertise helped owners regain control of their most difficult dogs. Explore the training ground, grooming room, and secure facility. Trust Doug… your dog will never be the same again.
State.Name: Training Doug (tier 2) - Doug the dog trainer

State.Author: rcfmartin
State.Description: Bloodmoon storms. When a real weather storm rolls into the biome you are standing in, it turns into a blood storm.Escape by moving to a calm biome or fight the horde. On top of that, the Clock slowly turns each biome into a permanent 24/7 storm on a schedule. Multiplayer-friendly
State.Name: Vagrant Storms

State.Author: Voltralux
State.Description: This is a compilation of custom made explorable and questable POI locations, currently totalling 26. These POI's range from Tier 1-5, supporting all quest types and are receiving constant support. In addition to dozens of new and varied locations to explore, this pack contains a range of new decorative items to craft and containers to loot.
State.Name: Voltralux's POI Pack (1.0)

State.Author: Brotteil
State.Description: Weapon Racks Redux is an authorized fork and modernization of Alter’s original Weapon Racks mod, rebuilt for 7 Days to Die V3.0. This is a separate authorized fork maintained under my name, not an official update to the original mod.
State.Name: Weapon Racks Redux

State.Author: Witos
State.Description:
Witos JLTV – Armored Military Vehicle for 7 Days to Die

Give your survival a tactical twist! This mod adds a JLTV (Joint Light Tactical Vehicle) to the game — a modern, rugged military vehicle built to withstand the dangers of the zombie apocalypse.
State.Name: Witos JLTV

State.Author: Witos
State.Description:
Extreme Off-Road Vehicles Mod – For 7 Days to Die.

Take your survival experience to the next level with these two fully customized off-road beasts! Built to conquer the harshest terrain
State.Name: Witos Off-Road

State.Author: Witos
State.Description:
"Snowmobile Mod - The Ultimate Winter Ride!"

Experience unparalleled control and realism as you conquer snowy terrain with advanced track movement, dynamic suspension, and customizable colors. Perfect for exploration, racing, and survival in extreme winter conditions!
State.Name: Witos SnowMobile

State.Author: Rodan
State.Description:
Con mas de 20 pisos de altura World Tower nació para imponer con su tamaño. Este enorme rascacielos cuenta con cientos de zombies en su interior y loot a lo largo del edificio.

Este lugar es la construcción mas alta del juego 

Es mi segundo prefab, es probable que encuentres algun error

Es mi primer edificio y en un futuro creare

(V2) Atomic Burger POI mod adds in a reconstructed version of the base game Wasteland rubble version which has been partially destroyed.

WARNING:- This mod should only be added to a new world because it replaces the default nests.

State.Description: The (V1) Oakraven Rock Drill mod allows players to craft and place an Oakraven Rock Drill. It can be given a Rock Drill Gas Can to power one mining cycle. Mining resources will be collected as loot for each cycle. This mod is installed in everyone's Mods folder because it contains custom assets.
State.Name: (V1) Oakraven Rock Drill

New Visuals on the new lockable slots! :) PURPLE BOOK ICON!

Gridlocks, Military and Police Checkpoints,Storytelling

This covers all my prefabs into 1 pack. We have 12 pois to go and explore and all of them have quests.



they range from T2 to T5 all with infested.

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: Adds a new UI in the main menu for you to switch between different sets of loading screens, and a fantastic set of loading screens created by the always awesome Mumpfy. Adding or removing new screen sets is completely plug-and-play. Compatible with game version V3 or later.

State.Author: LittleRedSonja
State.Description: Added a collection of 12 figurines portraying the Zombie creatures in game, and a 4 sets of 3 grouped figurines each for more compact decoration. Includes a "Catch them All" mode, find them all and get a nice reward. You can choose between "Craft + Loot" or "Loot Only" modes.
State.Name: LittleRedSonja Bad BoyZ Figurines

State.Description: A small mod that adds 24 Fallout Vault-Tec posters in "New" and "Old" style variants. All craftable, ready to decorate your Vault.

State.Author: LegionOfTheFallen
State.Description: Adds three powerful electrical blocks to 7 Days to Die: an Advanced Generator, a fuel-free Wind Turbine, and an Advanced Battery Bank. Includes custom models, sounds, animations, progression, recipes, loot, and trader integration.
State.Name: LOTF's Advanced power Mod v3.1

State.Author: Officecats5
State.Description: All ready for 1.0 in one download. All random world generated ready, quest ready and aligned with the TheFunPimps POI layouts style. Most of these it'll be hard to tell the difference between a vanilla and my POI.

State.Description: POI Scourge automatically marks cleared locations on your map with color-coded checkmarks based on difficulty. Instantly see your progress, ensure every zombie is dead with 100% clear verification, and track your domination across your journey. Includes configurable map colors, custom vending machines, and clear rewards.
State.Name: POI Scourge

State.Author: stallionsden
State.Description: A major bug in game is that when a prefabber places a trigger on a door if a zombie breaks the door the trigger volume attached to that door doesnt do anything and the player cant finish the quest unless they go thru the poi breaking the door trims left behind. This fixes that and allows the player to decide in the settings.xml with 2 options.
State.Name: StallionsDen's Door Trigger Fix

State.Author: Steelshotv98
State.Description: HUD personalizado para 7D2D v3.0 Experimental: toolbelt, barras de stats, XP, buffs, arma en mano, brújula, colores de calidad, misiones de trader, UI de vehículos y skip automático de la pestaña News al iniciar. Inspirado en SteelUI y CatUI. Beta — se agradecen reportes.

9 prefabs by Svarii packaged into a single modlet

*The files linked under Off-Site Requirements are not required, these are links to the standalone version of each prefab included in this package.

State.Description: A Tier 5 Energy Facility, explore a large underground level where each room tells a different story.

(V2) Game Menu Options mod allows players to choose greater or lower values in 11 Game Menu Options:

- XP Multiplier | 24 Hour Cycle | BM Count (32 for performance for V2.1~) | Storm Freq | AI Block Damage | AI Blood Moon Block Damage | Loot Abundance | Loot Respawn Time | Chunk Reset | Land Claim Size | Party Share Kill Range

State.Description: (V1) Self Seed Farming mod allows plants to return directly to planted seedlings when harvested at the end of their growth cycle. Feel free to tweak the recipes as you like!
